creator: emiliano.russo@ingv.it
text:
i don't know, probably "disabled" should be default since most users live well without parallel i/o support, but it would be cool if people that want to use this feature should just check the option and run make.

upstream docs (https://www.hdfgroup.org/HDF5/release/obtainsrc5110.html) explicitly cover both use cases ("Instructions for installing HDF5" / "Installation instructions for Parallel HDF5")
